center.name: Hawdon River
center.summary: The Hawdon River is a river of New Zealand.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is found in only three regions on New Zealand's South Island: the South Branch Hurunui River Valley, Hawdon River Valley, and the Poulter Valley
